name: Anamnesis: An Open-Source Platform for Large-Scale Backstory-Conditioned Survey Simulation
summary: arXiv:2607.10628v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present Anamnesis, an interactive system for demographically controllable survey simulation using large language models. Open-source, and design...
description: arXiv:2607.10628v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present Anamnesis, an interactive system for demographically controllable survey simulation using large language models. Open-source, and designed for non-technical users/researchers, Anamnesis enables the prototyping and stress-testing of survey instruments on virtual populations rather than real human subjects. The platform operationalizes...
author: Song-Ze Yu, Joseph Suh, Serina Chang, David M. Chan
